stemHtml: A jet transport aircraft is climbing with a constant CAS, and then transitions to flying a constant Mach No. Assuming no significant thrust reduction occurs, how do the following parameters change?

options.a: Rate of climb increases, coefficient of lift increases, angle of attack increases, pitch increases
options.b: Rate of climb remains constant, coefficient of lift remains constant, angle of attack remains constant, pitch remains constant.
options.c: Rate of climb increases, coefficient of lift remains constant, angle of attack decreases, pitch remains constant.
options.d: Rate of climb remains constant, coefficient of lift increases, angle of attack increases, pitch decreases.
